name_en: ✨CELINE CABAS TRIOMPHE🛍 Canvas Small Vertical Handbag 191542# 'Brown' Triumph Shopping Bag, super suitable for this autumn and winter. Compared to the old/new vintage, the Triumphal Arch pattern is more 3D, looking more stylish. Classic brown, very retro! 65% coated canvas, 35% calfskin, 100% cotton lining. Interior zip pocket, adjustable and detachable leather shoulder strap! Size: 28*33*8cm
